The Lifeism Dictionary is a dictionary on the [[Lifeism Wiki]] designed to record words and their meanings. The reason it exists is that Lifeism is dynamic and aims to use its words dynamically rather than statically. Most concepts are treated as verbs in English and should be treated as verbs in translations to other languages. Pages in this category are syntax oriented rather than concept oriented. For example go to the page [[apotheosis]] to understand apotheosis, go to the page [[Apotheosize]] to understand how the verb form is used
[[Category:Lifeism Dictionary]]
[[sn:Lifeism Dictionary]][[Category:Lifeism Wiki]]
==Archive==
Use this page as an archive of it https://web.archive.org/save/https://evolutionism.miraheze.org/wiki/Category:Lifeism_Dictionary as some pages may lose their categorization
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
